zh.lifeSummary: 當Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox於1187年之前出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾時，他的父親Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox26歲，母親Countessa Eva Menteith18歲。他和Elizabeth Stewart至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1251年3月12日在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾巴洛，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox于1187年之前出生在苏格兰登巴頓史爾时，他的父亲Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox26岁，母亲Countessa Eva Menteith18岁。他和Elizabeth Stewart至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1251年3月12日在苏格兰登巴頓史爾巴洛，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: Lennox
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: habitational name from the districtnear Dumbarton, recorded in 1174 in the form Leuenaichs and inthe following year as Levenax. Apparently it is named fromGaelic leamhan ‘elm’ + the locative suffix -ach +English -s.

variants.name: Lenox
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lennox  .

en.lifeSummary: When Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox was born before 1187, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, his father, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, was 26 and his mother, Countessa Eva Menteith, was 18. He had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Stewart. He died on 12 March 1251, in Balloch, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox est né avant 1187, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Countessa Eva Menteith, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Stewart. Il est décédé le 12 mars 1251, à Balloch, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.Lennox, Dunbarton, Scotland: The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox vor 1187 in Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox 26 und seine Mutter Countessa Eva Menteith 18. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Stewart mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 12. März 1251 in Balloch, Dunbartonshire, Scotland und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox è nato il prima del 1187 nel Dunbartonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Countessa Eva Menteith, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Elizabeth Stewart. Morì il 12 marzo 1251, nel Balloch, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennoxが1187年以前にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennoxは26歳，母Countessa Eva Menteithは18歳であった。彼はElizabeth Stewartとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1251年3月12日にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアボーロチで死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox(이)가 1187년 이전 스컷랜드 던바토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Countessa Eva Menteith(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Stewart(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1251년 3월 12일 스컷랜드 던바토실르 바럭에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox nasceu antes 1187, em Dunbartonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Countessa Eva Menteith, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Stewart. Ele faleceu em 12 de março de 1251, em Balloch, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ro.Lennox, Dunbarton, Scotland: The Lennox, Dunbartonshire, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox родился перед 1187 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Countessa Eva Menteith, 18. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Stewart. Он умер 12 марта 1251 г. в местности баллоч, дунбартоншир, Шотландия и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maldouen Lennox 3rd Earl of Lennox nació antes de 1187, en Dunbartonshire, Scotland, su papá, Alwyn Lennox 2nd Earl of Lennox, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Countessa Eva Menteith, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Elizabeth Stewart. Murió el 12 de marzo de 1251, en Balloch, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, y fue sepultado en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
